design_philosophy.core_concept: High-fidelity Sci-Fi Interface. Deep space blacks meets glowing plasma energy.

headings.name: Rajdhani
headings.usage: All section titles, page headers, metric values. Use uppercase with wide tracking for labels.

body.name: Plus Jakarta Sans
body.usage: General text, descriptions, inputs, sidebar links.

mono.name: JetBrains Mono
mono.usage: Logs, code snippets, API keys, raw data displays.

rules: Headings (Rajdhani) must use `tracking-wide` or `tracking-wider` when uppercase.
Metric numbers (e.g., '98%') should be Rajdhani Bold.
Body text should have `leading-relaxed` for readability against dark backgrounds.

sidebar.behavior: Fixed left, scrollable content area on right.

layout.spacing_scale: Generous. Use gap-6 or gap-8 for grids.

cards.base: bg-white/5 backdrop-blur-md border border-white/10 rounded-xl overflow-hidden

buttons.primary: bg-astra-purple text-white font-medium rounded-lg px-6 py-2.5 shadow-[0_0_15px_rgba(168,85,247,0.4)] hover:shadow-[0_0_25px_rgba(168,85,247,0.6)] hover:-translate-y-0.5 transition-all active:scale-95
buttons.secondary: bg-transparent border border-astra-cyan/30 text-astra-cyan hover:bg-astra-cyan/10 hover:border-astra-cyan/80 transition-all

inputs.style: bg-black/20 border border-white/10 rounded-lg focus:border-astra-purple focus:ring-1 focus:ring-astra-purple/50 text-white placeholder:text-slate-600 backdrop-blur-sm

visual_enhancers.glow_effects: Use `shadow-[0_0_20px_rgba(r,g,b,0.5)]` for active states. Do not overuse globally.
visual_enhancers.gradients: Use subtle linear gradients for text highlights: `bg-gradient-to-r from-astra-purple to-astra-cyan bg-clip-text text-transparent`.
visual_enhancers.borders: 1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.08) is the default divider. Active borders should glow.
visual_enhancers.background_mesh: Optional: A very subtle, fixed radial gradient orb in the bottom right or top left: `bg-[radial-gradient(ellipse_at_top_left,_var(--tw-gradient-stops))] from-astra-purple/10 via-black to-black`.

transitions.page_load: initial={{ opacity: 0, y: 20 }} animate={{ opacity: 1, y: 0 }} transition={{ duration: 0.5 }}

icons.style: Stroke width 1.5px (thin/elegant). Color: slate-400 (inactive), white or brand color (active).

images.description: Purple/Black Abstract Nebula. Use for: Login Screen Background or subtle Hero overlay opacity.
Blue/Black Fluid Art. Use for: Settings or Profile header background.

instructions_to_main_agent: 1. INSTALL FONTS: Add Google Fonts imports for Rajdhani, Plus Jakarta Sans, and JetBrains Mono to `index.css`.
2. CONFIGURE TAILWIND: Update `tailwind.config.js` to include the `astra-*` colors and font families.
3. GLOBAL CSS: Set body background to `bg-astra-bg` and text to `text-white`.
4. SHADCN OVERRIDES: Customize Shadcn components (Card, Button, Input) to remove white backgrounds and borders. Use `bg-white/5` and `border-white/10` instead.
5. SIDEBAR: Create a fixed sidebar component using glassmorphism. It must be transparent enough to see the background glow but readable.
6. CHARTS: When implementing charts, ensure grid lines are very subtle (#334155) and remove white backgrounds.
7. DATA-TESTID: Add `data-testid` to all interactive elements (buttons, inputs, sidebar links) as per strict rules.
universal_guidelines: Do not use gradients for main backgrounds (too messy). Use solid dark colors with subtle gradient *overlays*.
Never use pure white (#ffffff) for large background areas. Only for text/icons.
Ensure all text has sufficient contrast against the dark background.
